---
title: "Project Roadmap"
---

# Project Roadmap

| Version | Milestone | Status |
|----------|-----------|--------|
| v0.1 | ODMR Framework | ✅ |
| v0.2 | GUI | 🚧 |
| v0.3 | Rabi | Planned |
| v0.4 | Ramsey | Planned |
| v0.5 | T₁ / T₂ | Planned |
| v0.6 | Imaging | Planned |
| v0.7 | OPX Integration | Planned |
| v1.0 | Stable Release | Target |
